title: Disabled people's access to transport report: government response
body: "This document sets out the Department for Transport’s response to the Transport Select Committee’s report, Access denied: rights versus reality in disabled people’s access to transport.  It follows TSC’s inquiry that was carried out between 2023 to 2024.  Audio version  DfT’s response to TSC’s report has been supplied in an audio version.  The running time is 21 minutes and 23 seconds.  Disabled people’s access to transport report: government response (audio version)  British sign language version  DfT’s response to TSC’s report has been supplied in a sign language version.  The running time is 45 minutes and 45 seconds.  Disabled people’s access to transport report: government response (sign language version)  "
